_meta.purpose: Words removed from the daily SOLUTIONS pool. Has no effect on the GUESSES list — players can still type anything that fits the alphabet.
_meta.policy: Conservative. When in doubt about whether a term is an ethnic slur, do NOT add it.
_meta.source_seed: Manual curation. LDNOOBW (github.com/LDNOOBW/...) can be a starting point but its files mix profanity with slurs — do not import wholesale.
_meta.how_to_extend: Append lowercase 5-letter strings (after normalisation per locale) to the `terms` array, then re-run scripts/generate-wordlists.mjs. The pipeline filters case-sensitively against the normalised solutions pool.
